cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, namaste Savitri ji, this is Rohan from SBI Life Insurance. How are you today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm doing well, thank you. What's this call about, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, we just wanted to remind you that your annual health insurance premium is due next week, Savitri ji. The amount is Rs. 25,000.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, I see. Can you please tell me how I can make this payment, Rohan?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 27s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A legitimate agent from [INSURANCE_COMPANY] calls to remind a customer that their annual health insurance premium is due next week. They inform the customer of the amount and suggest they can pay it through the company's official website, mobile app, or at a branch.
